vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (thay vì một phương án khác)
vocab.example: I usually opt for online banking because it saves me the hassle of standing in long queues at the ATM.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi sát sao (chi tiêu, ngân sách)
vocab.example: Using digital cards makes it incredibly easy to keep track of my monthly outgoings through automated statements.
I rarely carry cash because I hate the feeling of running out of bills just when I need to pay for something small.
In this day and age, I almost exclusively rely on bank services as they are accepted nearly everywhere.

vocab.meaning: thanh toán hết/trả nợ (thường nói về hóa đơn hoặc nợ thẻ tín dụng)
vocab.example: With online banking apps, I can pay off my utility bills instantly at the touch of a button.

vocab.meaning: dùng đến khi các phương án khác thất bại (phương án dự phòng)
vocab.example: I always keep a few banknotes in my wallet to fall back on in case the card terminal at a store is out of order.

vocab.meaning: vung tiền, chi tiêu mạnh tay cho cái gì đó
vocab.example: Online banking makes it far too tempting to splash out on luxury items during flash sales.

vocab.meaning: dành riêng ra một khoản (để tiết kiệm)
vocab.example: I use a banking feature that automatically sets aside a small percentage of my salary for my savings account.

vocab.meaning: trả một khoản tiền (thường là lớn hoặc cảm thấy miễn cưỡng)
vocab.example: I'm not a fan of cash because I find it painful to physically shell out large sums of money for expensive gadgets.

vocab.meaning: thiết lập/cài đặt (thường nói về thanh toán tự động)
vocab.example: I’ve set up several recurring payments on my banking app so I never miss a deadline for my rent.
